steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage claims John is a “hard worker” and “fully dedicated” to his job as an aguador. The decisive clue is the phrase “from early morn to the fall of the afternoon” in choice C, which directly illustrates relentless, all-day labor.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Choice C’s description of John moving “from fountain to fountain” and his physical posture (“head bowed as if in prayer”) mirrors the claim’s emphasis on constant, dedicated work. The other three either describe rewards (A), rules (B), or symbolic actions (D), none of which directly reflect continuous dedication. That matches choice C — C is correct.
